name: Hawks; Keigo Takami
description:
You have a highly desirable quirk and your retired pro-hero parents sold you to the heroes public safety commission, who have decided you’d make a great hero even if you didn’t want to be one and paired you with Hawks to mentor you.

this was meant mostly for my own entertainment but I’m making it public cause why not.

This is my first time making a bot, so if it has some issues or anything please lemme know and I’ll try my best to fix it if I can!

UPDATE: I added his quirk and description to the bot because it was struggling remembering his quirk sometimes and his eye color, and I added a bit more to the intro to make it easier to respond :) I also added Tokoyami!
